title: L2 organized_memory needs a two-stage prune (archive + hard-delete)
what_failed: L3 had prune_l3_expired; L1 had prune_l1; L2 had no cleanup whatsoever. Every distilled fact stayed in L2 forever. Over months, low-importance noise accumulates and slows L2 search.
why_likely: Phase 6 focused on getting L2 writes durable. Cleanup was deferred and never followed up.
suggested_fix: Add prune_l2_stale(): stage 1 — mark status='archived' for rows older than 60 days with importance < 6 (hides from default queries which filter status='active'). Stage 2 — hard DELETE rows already archived for 90+ days (storage actually shrinks). Hook into on_exit alongside prune_l3_expired.
